a11y.skipToMain: Tlula ku ya eka ndzima ya ntlhoko

keys.backupCreated: Hlayisa ya ntlhambi ya xitshuri yi endliwe naswona yi downlodiwe ✓
keys.restored: Hlayisa ya ntlhambi yi vuyisiwe ✓ Tinhloko ta xitshuri ti longiwe laha
keys.noBackup: A ku na hlayisa ya xitshuri leyi sirhelekeke eka akhawunti leyi
keys.missingPublicKey: Hlayisa yi kayi na ntlhambi wa xitshuri wa mani na mani

keySetup.title: Hlela tinhloko ta xitshuri ta xitirhisi xa wena
keySetup.description: Xitirhisi lexi a xi na ntlhambi wa wena wa xitshuri. Importa hlayisa leyi sirhelekeke hi password, kumbe endla ntlhambi wuntshwa (u ta kota ku hlaya milabya leyintshwa ku sukela sweswi).
keySetup.imported: Ntlhambi wa xitshuri wu importiwe eka xitirhisi lexi. U ta kota ku hlaya milabya ya khale sweswi.
keySetup.enterPassword: Nghenisa password ya akhawunti ya wena ku endla hlayisa ya tinhloko ta wena hi ndlela leyi sirhelekeke.

auth.headline: Ku yingisa milabya leyi sirhelekeke eka mani na mani, eka ndhawu yihi na yihi
auth.description: Ku sirhelela end-to-end, ku hundzuluxa milabya eka tindzimi ta 100+, milabya leyi nyamalalaka, na ku ringana ka rito/vidiyo.

feature.encryption: Ku sirhelela end-to-end hi ku tiyisela
feature.translation: Ku hundzuluxa milabya hi ndlela ya clevu leyi aka eka app
feature.disappearing: Milabya leyi nyamalalaka & ku amukela ku hlaya
feature.privacy: Nhluvukiso wa xiphemu xa ntlhoko. Data ya wena, nlawulo wa wena.
feature.translate: Ku hundzuluxa milabya hi ndlela ya clevu leyi aka eka app

hero.line1: Ku yingisa milabya leyi sirhelekeke eka mani na mani, eka ndhawu yihi na yihi — na
hero.sub: Kuma nomboro ya xitirhisi ya xitshuri ya mahala ku ringana na ku tsala eka misava hinkwayo hi Wi-Fi kumbe data. Tsakela ku sirhelela end-to-end, milabya leyi nyamalalaka, na ku ringana ka rito/vidiyo hi HD — na switirhisiwa leswi aka eka app leswi ku pfuna ku va eku hlanganeni eka mindzilo ya mindzilo.
hero.freeNote: Ku ringana na ku tsala ka mahala. AI ya xiyimo xa le henhla na switirhisiwa swa xiyimo xa le henhla swi lava ku upgrade.

feat.translate: Ku tshova swiphemu swa ririmi eka ku yingisana ka wena
feat.disappear: Milabya leyi nyamalalaka & ku amukela ku hlaya
feat.privacy: Nhluvukiso wa xiphemu xa ntlhoko. Data ya wena, nlawulo wa wena.

auth.desktopTip: Eka desktop? Skena hi xitirhisi xa wena ku kuma app.
auth.scanHelper: Eka desktop? Skena hi xitirhisi xa wena ku kuma app.

headlineAlt.main: Xitirhisi xa milabya lexi sirhelekeke lexi

auth.subhead: Milabya ya xiphemu xa ntlhoko, leyi sirhelekeke, leyi hundzuluxiweke — hi xinkarha.
auth.tip: Xiphemu: Tirhisa akhawunti yin'we eka web na mobile. Milabya ya wena yi sala yi synced.
auth.scanHint: Skena ku download app kumbe ku pfula eka browser ya wena.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 ti-nhlamuselo. Tirhisa password leyi tiyileke, leyi nga faniki na yin'wana.
registration.smsConsent: Hi ku endla akhawunti, u pfumelela ku amukela SMS notifications leyi fambisanaka na xitirhisi xa wena xa Chatforia (ku fana na milabya ku suka eka vafana lavan'wana). Mitirho ya message & data yi nga va kona. U nga tshika nkarhi wihi na wihi eka Settings.

auth.addRecipient: Engetela muamukeri wa le henhla ku sungula…
auth.enterValidRecipient: Nghenisa vito ra muhlekisani leri hlayisekeke kumbe nomboro ya xitirhisi.
auth.sendFailed: Ku rhuma ku hlulekile. Vona console ku kuma vukavukavuki.

home.title: Kaya
home.subheader: Rhuma milabya ku sungula in'we ya milabya.

refund.title: Nawu wa Ku Vuyiseriwa ka Mali
refund.intro: Eka Chatforia, hi ringeta ku nyika ntirho wa xiyimo xa le henhla eka vatirhisi hinkwavo. Nawu lowu wu hlamusela nkarhi lowu mali yi nga vuyiseriwaka.

subscriptions.title: Ku Tsarisa (Subscriptions)
subscriptions.body: Ku tsarisa ku hakeriwa emahlweni naswona ku tlhela ku endliwa nkarhi na nkarhi. U nga swi kota ku yimisa nkarhi wun’wana na wun’wana hi ku tirhisa swiyimiso swa akhawunti ya wena kumbe pulatifomo leyi u xaveke ha yona.

eligibility.title: Ku Faneleka ka Ku Vuyiseriwa ka Mali
eligibility.body: Mali yi nga vuyiseriwa loko ku ri na ku hakela kambirhi, swihoxo swa ku hakela, kumbe swiphiqo swa thekinoloji leswi sivaka ku tirhisa swilo leswi hakeriwaka. Swikombelo hinkwaswo swi kambisisiwa hi ku landzelela xiyimo xa swona.

nonRefundable.title: Leswi Nga Vuyiseriwiki
nonRefundable.body: Hi ntolovelo a hi vuyiseli mali eka nkarhi lowu nga tirhisiwangiki, xiphemu xa nkarhi wa subscription, kumbe loko u nga yimisanga ku tsarisa ka wena emahlweni ka ku pfuxetiwa.

thirdParty.title: Ku Xava hi Vafambisi van’wana
thirdParty.body: Loko u xave hi pulatifomo yin’wana yo fana na Apple App Store, u fanele ku kombela ku vuyiseriwa ka mali hi ku kongoma eka pulatifomo yoleyo.

contact.title: Ku Tihlanganisa na Hina
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

about.title: Mayelana na Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia i pulatifomo ya ku vulavurisana ya manguva lawa leyi endliweke ku pfuna ku vulavurisana loku sirhelelekeke naswona loku nga na tindzimi to tala...
about.valuesTitle: Leswi hi swi tekaka swi ri swa nkoka
about.privacyDesc: Ku sirheleriwa ka matimba hi ku tirhisa encryption na swiyimiso leswi lawuriwaka hi mutirhisi
about.accessDesc: Ku hundzuluxiwa ka tindzimi ku akiwe endzeni
about.controlDesc: Swivumbeko swo fana na marungula lama nyamalalaka na ku komba loko marungula ma hlayiwile

whyMessaging.title: Ha yini Tipulatifomo ta Ku Hlanganisa ti Ri ta Nkoka Swinene
whyMessaging.intro: Tipulatifomo ta ku vulavurisana ti hundzuke switirhisiwa swa nkoka swinene emisaveni ya namuntlha...
whyMessaging.everydayTitle: Ku vulavurisana ka siku na siku
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Vanhu va titshege hi ti-app ta ku vulavurisana siku na siku...
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Marungula ma rhumeriwa hi ku hatlisa...
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Tipulatifomo ti hlanganisa vanhu emisaveni hinkwayo...
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Tipulatifomo ta manguva lawa ti nyika vatirhisi ndzhawulo...
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ku vulavurisana ku ya emahlweni ku cinca...
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia yi akiwile hi milawu leyi...

global.title: Rito ra Ku vulavurisana ka Misava hinkwayo
global.intro: Ku vulavurisana ku cincile hi ku hatlisa...
global.barriersDesc: Vanhu va nga hlangana emisaveni hinkwayo...
global.translationDesc: Ririmi ri tshama ri ri xihingakanyo...
global.privacyDesc: Vatirhisi va lava ku tshemba leswaku marungula ya vona ma sirhelelekile...
global.futureDesc: Rito ra nkarhi lowu taka ri ta katsa swilo leswintshwa...
global.outro: Tipulatifomo to fana na Chatforia ti hlanganyela eka ku cinca loku...

index.title: Blog ya Chatforia
index.post1: Ndlela yo vulavula hi ndlela yo sirheleleka eka inthanete
index.post2: Rito ra Ku vulavurisana ka Misava hinkwayo
index.post3: Ha yini Tipulatifomo ta Ku Hlanganisa ti Ri ta Nkoka

howItWorks.intro: Chatforia yi endliwile leswaku ku vulavurisana ku olova...
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tsarisa hi ku tirhisa imeyili kumbe vito ra mutirhisi...
howItWorks.step3Title: 3. Ku rhumela marungula hi nkarhi wa xiviri
howItWorks.step3Desc: Marungula ma fika hi ku hatlisa...
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ku hundzuluxa tindzimi ku pfuna vatirhisi...

safety.enforcementDesc: Hi nga teka goza eka ti-akhawunti...

chat.selectPrompt: Hlawula milabya kumbe kamara ya milabya ku sungula ku yingisana
chat.emptySubtitle: Rhuma milabya ku sungula in'we ya milabya.
chat.blockConfirm: Block {{name}}? U nge amukeli milabya ku suka eka vona.
chat.blockError: A swi kotekanga ku kuma mutirhisi wa ku block.
chat.encryptedUnavailable: Milabya leyi sirhelekeke (ntlhambi a wu kumiwi)
chat.unlockToView: Unlock ntlhambi wa wena ku vona milabya leyi

messageInput.freeLimit: Free plan limit: auto-delete ku fika eka siku 1. Clamped to 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Max auto-delete for Premium is 30 days. Clamped to 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Type a message or attach a file to send.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Encryption hlulekile. Milabya a yi rhumiwanga.
messageInput.caption: Caption (optional)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Attachment yi le nkulu. Lulamisela fayili leyi nga le kulu.
errors.unsupportedFile: Muxaka wa fayili a wu seketeliwi.
errors.rateLimit: U rhuma milabya hi xinkarha xo tlula. Please slow down.
errors.validation: Validation error. Please check your message and try again.
errors.failedToSend: Failed to send. You can retry the failed bubble.

contactList.noContactsFound: A ku na vafana lavi kumiweke.
contactList.notJoined: Muamukeri loyi a nga si join Chatforia.
contactList.couldNotStart: A swi kotekanga ku sungula milabya. Please try again.
contactList.startFailed: Failed to start chat. Please try again.
contactList.deleteFailed: Failed to delete contact. Please try again.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Failed to update alias. Please try again.
contactList.loadFailed: Failed to load contacts. Please try again.
contactList.callStarted: Calling this number via your Chatforia number…
contactList.callFailed: Failed to start call. Please try again.

startChatModal.title: Sungula in'we ya milabya
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Search name, username, or phone number
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: A ku na vafana lavi fana na search ya wena.
startChatModal.noRecentInteractions: A ku na recent interactions yet.

addContactModal.title: Engetela contact
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Nghenisa nomboro ya xitirhisi kumbe username.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: U nge engeteli wena tanihi contact.

sidebar.loginPrompt: Nghena ku edit settings ya wena.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: A ku na media cached locally yet.

status.filesNote: Ku fika eka 5 files. 24h expiry hi default.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.mustLogin: U fanele u sign in ku vona settings.
profile.noPrivateKey: A ku na private key eka xitirhisi lexi ku export.
profile.setBackupPassword: Set a password to encrypt your backup:
profile.importSuccess: Private key imported to this device.
profile.importFailed: Failed to import key (incorrect password or corrupt file).
profile.keysRotated: New key pair generated and public key uploaded.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ntlhambi wa wena wa xitshuri a wu tshuki wu suka eka xitirhisi lexi. Exporta copy leyi sirhelekeke hi password ku vuyisela eka xitirhisi xin'wana.
profile.themeFreeNotice: U ri eka Free—tirhisa Sun/Moon options leyi le henhla. Upgrade ku unlock more themes.
profile.backupDesc: Hlayisa ntlhambi wa wena wa encryption ku vuyisela milabya ya wena hi ndlela leyi sirhelekeke eka xitirhisi xin'wana.
profile.freePlanCopy: U ri eka free plan. Upgrade ku unlock more features like backups, extra numbers, and advanced privacy options.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Could not open billing portal. Please try again.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Notify me if my message is copied
profile.followHint: Stories ta vona ti ta voneka eka Following feed ya wena loko va posta hi audience Followers (or Public).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Something went wrong in this section.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Forward incoming calls and texts to your verified phone or email. Outgoing calls/texts can show your Chatforia number.
profile.errSmsDest: Hlawula at least one destination (phone or email).
profile.errQuietHours: Quiet hours must be between 0 and 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Hi hlayisa age range ntsena (a hi date of birth ya wena hi ndlela leyi tiyileke). Xi tirhisiwa ku hlayisa Random Chat pairings hi ndlela leyi faneleke.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Tirhisa age-based matching eka Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Loko on, hi ta try ku ku matsha na vanhu va age ranges leyi faneleke.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Vanhu va mani u ta matshiwa na vona?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens va matshiwa ntsena na van'wana va teens. Adults a va matshiwi na teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Hi ku sirhelela, akhawunti va 13–17 va matshiwa ntsena na akhawunti va 13–17 eka Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things you tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Loko leyi on, Foria yi nga tirhisa past Random Chat conversations (ntsena na wena) ku hlayisa ku yingisana ku famba. U nga tshika nkarhi wihi na wihi.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Siya empty ku hlayisa hi nkarhi hinkwawo
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Yi tirhisiwa loko audio greeting ya wena yi nga kumiwi.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails ku suka eka nomboro ta wena ta Chatforia ti ta hlayisiwa eka Voicemail inbox ya wena. U nga enable transcription na forwarding eka mapulani laya seketeliwa.
profile.portHint: U lava ku hlayisa nomboro ya wena ya khale? U nga port eka Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Kuma mobile data ya Chatforia loko u ri ehandle ka Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Manage Chatforia mobile plan ya wena, nomboro, forwarding, na number porting.

options.heading: Hlawula ndlela leyi u lavaka ku tirhisa Chatforia
options.subheading: U nga kuma nomboro ya Chatforia leyintshwa, kumbe u tisa nomboro ya wena ya khale ku suka eka carrier yin'wana.
options.portNumber: Port nomboro ya wena ya khale eka Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Port nomboro ya wena ya khale
port.subheading: Hambisa nomboro ya wena ya xitirhisi ya khale ku suka eka carrier ya wena ya khale eka Chatforia. Vona leswaku vukavukavuki byi fana na carrier account ya wena hi ndlela leyi tiyileke ku avoid delays.
port.phoneNumberLabel: Nomboro ya xitirhisi ya ku port
port.success: Port request submitted! Hi ta ku hlayisa updated.

status.heading: Porting status
status.subheading: Track the status of your number port requests.
status.none: A ku na porting activity yet.

wireless.dataLow: Data ya wena yi le ku fika xiyimo xa le hansi.
wireless.exhausted: Data ya wena yi fikele. Buy a new pack ku continue ku tirhisa mobile data.

error.invite: Could not create an invite. Make sure you are the family owner and try again.
error.checkout: We could not start checkout for a Family plan. Please try again.

billing.freePlanCopy: U ri eka free plan. Upgrade ku unlock more features.
billing.portalError: Unable to open the billing portal right now.
billing.cancelNowHelp: U nga manage or kansela subscription ya wena eka billing portal, or kansela immediately le henhla.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: U na ntiyiso wa ku kansela plan ya wena immediately? Le swi nge tlhuvyeki.
billing.cancelNowError: Unable to cancel your plan right now. Please try again or use Manage billing.

none.title: A ku na family set up yet
none.body: Ku endla Chatforia Family na shared data pool, sungula Family plan.

data.heading: Shared data pool
data.caption: Vanhu hinkwavo va share pool leyi. Hi ta ku warn loko u fika eka limit.

invite.title: Invite a new member
invite.body: Rhuma email or link ku invite munhu eka shared family data pool ya wena.
invite.expiryHint: Link leyi yi ta expire endzhaku ka a few days. U nga endla leyintshwa nkarhi wihi na wihi.

join.title: Join a family
join.body: U invitewe ku join Chatforia Family na share data pool ya vona.
join.success: U joinile family leyi. U sweswi u share data pool ya vona.
join.error: We could not add you to this family. The invite may be invalid or expired.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Sungula na free, ad-supported plan. Ya ad-free na Plus, or unlock full power features na Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Hlawula app plan, engetela data packs eka wena, or share data na family ya wena — hinkwaswo ku suka eka ndhawu yin'we.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Sungula na free, ad-supported plan. Ya ad-free na Plus, or unlock full power features na Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Engetela global eSIM data ku hlayisa Chatforia yi tirha loko u ri ehandle ka Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Endla shared data pool ya family ya wena na manage usage ya munhu un'we eka ndhawu yin'we.

scheduleBanner.title: Subscription yi ta hela
scheduleBanner.body: U ta vuyela eka Free hi

free.title: Free
free.desc: Sungula ku yingisa milabya hi mahala. Ideal loko u ri ku try Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 na group chat, plus voice na video calls
features.media: Share photos, voice messages, na short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies na instant translation (fair use)
features.disappearing: Disappearing messages na basic privacy controls
features.ads: Free forever na ads eka app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Hinkwaswo essentials, without ads. Great for everyday messaging na calling.

features.allFree: Everything in Free, with no ads
features.forwarding: Forward calls na texts to your real phone number
features.support: Faster support loko something goes wrong

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, na priority support.

features.themes: Unlock all premium color themes na app customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools for rewrites, smart replies, na summaries
features.support: Priority support loko u lava help hi xiyimo xa le henhla

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Save more loko billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, na priority support.

features.allPremium: Everything in Premium Monthly — including extra color themes
features.save25: Save around 30% compared to paying monthly
features.bestFor: Best for power users, remote workers, na heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Save 30% with annual – continue to login
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.

marketing.freeDesc: Sungula ku yingisa milabya hi mahala.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, na AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Billed upfront. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Engetela global data ku hlayisa Chatforia yi tirha loko u ri ehandle ka Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country na currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Hlawula one-time global data pack ku hlayisa Chatforia yi tirha loko u ri eku tsameni or ehandle ka Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Hi nge xavisi data packs leyi nga le hansi ka 3 GB.

features.throttle: Speeds may slow after high usage

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible na unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, na country. Coverage na speeds vary by region.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Includes 3 GB of high-speed data — ideal for light messaging na occasional calls.
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, na occasional calls

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Includes 5 GB of high-speed data for trips, commuting, na regular VoIP calls.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP calls, na maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Includes 10 GB of high-speed data for heavy chat, calls, na video on the Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, calls, video, na hotspot use
large.aria: Buy Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, na other apps on your phone).

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Share a single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB of shared high-speed data — great for 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy na local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs create or top up a shared data pool. U nga invite na remove members anytime.
family.footnote: Family packs share a single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability na limits depend on your country na local regulations.

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia yi ku nyika real phone number, smart translation, na clear path ku ya ad-free loko u ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, simple Plus upgrade loko u ready, na Premium tools TextNow a yi nyiki.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, na built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — na AI na status built in. Great loko u ri ku suka eka apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information na may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
free.a: Ina. Free plan yi katsa Chatforia number, calling, na messaging na ads. U nga hlayisa eka Free hi nkarhi hinkwawo, or upgrade ku remove ads na unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus yi remove ads na yi extend message history ya wena — perfect for everyday use. Premium yi engetela extra customization, AI tools for rewrites na replies, na priority support for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile yi tirhisa global eSIM coverage. Availability yi depends on your country na device. U ta vona supported options during activation eka app.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Ina. U nga manage or kansela subscription ya wena ku suka eka billing page eka app. Changes ti ta va effective eka end of your current billing period.

family.a: Family packs yi endla shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. Munhu un'we u paya bill, na u nga invite or remove members na set limits per person.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: U ri ntswa eka Chatforia? Xiphemu lexi xi kombisa essentials ku va productive hi xinkarha xa few minutes.

alert.text: Xiphemu lexi xi ta kula loko hi launch new features. Loko something missing, hi byele hi

section1.title: 1) Endla akhawunti ya wena
section1.loginText: na akhawunti ya wena ya khale.

section2.title: 2) Sungula ku yingisa milabya
section2.item1: Endla DM or Group na rhuma milabya ya wena ya ntlhoko.
section2.item2: Tirhisa instant translation ku yingisana eka tindzimi ta 100+.
section2.item3: Try disappearing messages na read receipts eka Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Ya eka xiyimo xa le henhla
section3.item1: U nga upgrade ku paid plan anytime eka app.
section3.item2: Loko u signed in, u nga link additional devices na set up encrypted backups ku suka eka Settings eka app.

account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
account.a: Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Ina. Messages na calls va end-to-end encrypted hi default. Ntsena wena na muamukeri u ta kota ku va hlaya.

translate.a: Enable “Auto-translate” eka Settings → Appearance & Language. Hi translate on-device loko supported, otherwise through secure APIs na minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots na app version ya wena.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team yi ta reply hi email.
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Privacy Policy leyi yi hlamusela ndlela leyi Chatforia (“we”, “us”) yi collect, use, na share information loko u tirhisa apps na services ya hina. Hi design Chatforia ku minimize data leyi hi nga yi kuma.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create na secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; hi nge yi hlaya.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers na SMS
sms.body: Loko u choose ku nyika mobile phone number, hi yi tirhisa ku enable features such as account verification, login alerts, na user-to-user messaging via SMS loko supported. Hi nga rhuma transactional SMS messages related to your account na activity on Chatforia. U nga opt out of receiving SMS messages anytime by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences eka app. Hi nge xavisi phone number ya wena or yi tirhisa for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Engetela muamukeri wa le henhla ku sungula…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide na secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Hi nge xavisi personal data. Hi nga share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), u nga request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: Hi retain ntsena leswi lavekaka ku operate the service na apply industry-standard security. E2E content a xi nge decryptiwi hi hina.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia a xi directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: Hi ta post updates laha na revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia u agree to these Terms. Loko u nga pfumeleli, u nga tirhisi service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info na hlayisa credentials hi ndlela leyi sirhelekeke.
accounts.itemResponsibility: U na responsibility for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: Loko u provide mobile phone number, u agree that Chatforia yi nga ku rhumela SMS messages related to your account na use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, na messages related to conversations u initiate or participate in. Hi nge tirhisi SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message na data rates may apply. U nga opt out of SMS messages anytime by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings eka app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: U hlayisa rights to your content. U grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service yi provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia a yi liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: Hi nga update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia a yi xavisi personal information. California residents u nga submit requests under CPRA using the button le henhla.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia yi tirhisa minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). Hi nge tirhisi third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Unable to load phone number status.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: A ku na nomboro leyi assigned. Hlawula yin'we hi area code ku sungula ku tsala.

startChatModal.title: Sungula milabya
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Type a name, username, phone, or email…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Type a username or phone na press Search.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Phone/email entries ti ta va available endzhaku ka loko u va hlayisa tanihi contacts.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Failed to start chat na selected recipients.

sounds.freeNotice: U ri eka Free — premium tones ti kombisiwa kambe ti locked. Upgrade ku unlock all.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Xitirhisi lexi xi lava Premium plan.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control translation, smart replies, na ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Rhuma last few received messages (sanitized) to AI ku suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Loko on, suggestions returned by AI ti ta va na flagged words masked

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase loko u prefer larger text in accessibility settings.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners na title blink ku u nga miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration na notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash loko call ri ringa.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Engetela transcript to audio messages u amukela.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners na title blink ku u nga miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash loko call ri ringa.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store only ciphertext on the server. Disables AI/Translate na moderation previews.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Linked Devices
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: A ku na linked devices kumiweke.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Search by alias, name, username, or phone
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: A few fast ways to get rolling.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Share your invite link ku sungula ku yingisana instantly.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Hlayisa ku hlangana eka go na Chatforia for iOS na Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Xiphemu: Milabya ya wena yi sala yi synced across web na mobile.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Kuma munhu wuntshwa instantly. Hi ta ku matsha na ku pfula temporary chat room. Yana eka xihundla eku sungula. Engetela Xirhandzani endzhaku loko swi fana na leswi.
randomChat.noPartner: A ku na partner kumiweke sweswi.
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats u nga hlayisa
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Hi hlayisa age range ntsena (a hi exact date of birth ya wena). Xi tirhisiwa ku hlayisa Random Chat pairings hi ndlela leyi faneleke. Ku matsha na vanhu (a hi RiaBot ntsena), set age band ya wena eka Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set age range ya wena eka Profile → Age & Random Chat ku matshiwa na vanhu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ku matsha na vanhu (a hi RiaBot ntsena), set age band ya wena eka Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Kuma munhu wuntshwa instantly, or hlawula ku yingisana na Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Set age range ya wena eka Profile → Age & Random Chat ku matshiwa na vanhu.
randomChat.messageMatch: Rhuma milabya eka match ya wena...
